issues: verifier marked attempt as not passed

extra_model_fields.reasoning_summary: Most claims are grounded in the runbook preview and agent trace, and limitations are explicitly noted. However, contradictory passed/failed criteria entries and opaque score aggregation reduce internal consistency.
verifier_issues_summary: Internal inconsistency: failed_criteria lists ri_4 while passed_criteria simultaneously includes ri_4 in one section and excludes it in another; duplicate rubric blocks conflict.
Final_score 0.778 is not transparently supported by visible rubric item scores (simple average is approximately 0.80) with no stated weighting/rounding rationale.

Evidence grounding relies primarily on the runbook text preview (xlsx not previewable); grader appropriately caveats this, but parts of the evaluation (ATT&CK mapping sheet) cannot be independently verified from artifact previews.

notes: ATT&CK technique IDs referenced are grounded in the agent trace; the specific mapping sheet content cannot be previewed but the grader flags this limitation.
Statement 'No disqualifying errors detected' is evaluative but not contradicted by [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]

extra_model_fields.reasoning_summary: Grader evidence aligns with materialized artifacts and the runbook content preview. Claimed timeline events, parameter changes, and safety-margin figures are visible in the runbook preview and corroborated by actual_outputs summary and workbook internals (presence of xl/charts/chart1.xml). ATT&CK mapping details were noted as not visible and were properly caveated by the grader. Final score (0.86) is consistent with rubric item scores (~0.85 average) and stated score_source. No hidden reference usage or leakage detected.
